title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF -  Update Available
scenario: No "Update Available" notification appears on successful pairing when Notifications master toggle is OFF and app is in background with lower firmware version device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile phone.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Ensure the Notifications master toggle is set to OFF.
4. Close the app to background (do not force close).
5. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired to the phone, with a firmware version lower than the current version available on the server.
6. Power on the paired Poly device and wait for it to successfully connect to the phone.
7. Observe the phone's notification area for any "Update Available" notification.
expected: No "Update Available" notification appears upon successful pairing when the Notifications master toggle is OFF.
